---
title: "Resume"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

You can view my resume directly on this page or download it as a PDF.

::: {.text-center}
[Download CV (PDF)](assets/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

### Preview

<object data="assets/cv.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="800px">
    <p>It appears you don't have a PDF plugin for this browser. You can 
    <a href="assets/cv.pdf">click here to download the PDF file.</a></p>
</object>

### Contact Information

Feel free to reach out to me through:

- Email: <script type="text/javascript">
    var user = "arisbw";
    var domain = "gmail.com";  // Change this to your actual provider
    document.write('<a href="mailto:' + user + '@' + domain + '">' + user + '@' + domain + '</a>');
  </script><noscript>[Email protected - please enable JavaScript]</noscript>
- LinkedIn: [Aris Budi Wibowo](https://linkedin.com/in/arisbw)
- GitHub: [@arisbw](https://github.com/arisbw)
